zh.Berners Roding, Essex, England: 英國艾可波納斯 洛丁
zh.West Horsley, Surrey, England: 英國素瑞韋斯特 霍斯利
zh.Strethall, Barnston, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可斯特利塔爾
zh.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Berners是Sir Ralph de Berners和Matilda的兒子，出生在英國艾可波納斯 洛丁。他於大約1270年與Christiana FitzHugh de Windsor在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1295年被列為custodian of the archbishop of canterbury。他去世於1297年1月在英國英格蘭，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.Berners Roding, Essex, England: 英国艾可波納斯 洛丁
zh-hans.West Horsley, Surrey, England: 英国素瑞韋斯特 霍斯利
zh-hans.Strethall, Barnston, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可斯特利塔爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Berners是Sir Ralph de Berners和Matilda的儿子，出生在英国艾可波納斯 洛丁。他于大约1270年与Christiana FitzHugh de Windsor在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1295年被列为custodian of the archbishop of canterbury。他去世于1297年1月在英国英格兰，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Berners
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Bernières (Calvados).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Berners was born in Berners Roding, Essex, England as the son of Sir Ralph de Berners and Matilda. He married Christiana FitzHugh de Windsor about 1270, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. In 1295, his occupation is listed as custodian of the archbishop of canterbury. He died in January 1297, in England, United Kingdom, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Berners est né à Berners Roding, Essex, Angleterre, fils de Sir Ralph de Berners et Matilda. Il a épousé Christiana FitzHugh de Windsor environ 1270, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. En 1295, sa profession de son indiquée est custodian of the archbishop of canterbury. Il est décédé en janvier 1297, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Berners wurde in Berners Roding, Essex, England, als Sohn von Sir Ralph de Berners und Matilda geboren. Er hat um 1270 in England Christiana FitzHugh de Windsor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1295 ist sein Beruf als custodian of the archbishop of canterbury aufgeführt. Er starb im Januar 1297 in England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Berners è nato il nel Berners Roding, Essex, England come figlio di Sir Ralph de Berners e Matilda. Lui sposato Christiana FitzHugh de Windsor circa 1270, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1295, la sua occupazione è indicata come custodian of the archbishop of canterbury. Morì nel gennaio 1297, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a London, England.

ja.Berners Roding, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスバーナーズ ロディング
ja.West Horsley, Surrey, England: イギリススリーウエスト ホールスリー
ja.Strethall, Barnston, Essex, England: イギリスイギリスエセックスストレサル
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Bernersはイギリスエセックスバーナーズ ロディングでSir Ralph de BernersとMatildaの息子として生まれた。約1270年にイギリスでChristiana FitzHugh de Windsorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1295年，職業はcustodian of the archbishop of canterburyと記録されている。彼は1297年1月にイギリスイギリスで死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Berners(은)는 영국 에세스 버너스 로딩에서 Sir Ralph de Berners(와)과 Matilda의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1270년 영국에서 Christiana FitzHugh de Windsor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1295년, 그의 직업은 custodian of the archbishop of canterbury이었다. 그는 1297년 1월 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

mn.Strethall, Barnston, Essex, England: Strethall, Ēastseaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Berners nasceu em Berners Roding, Essex, Inglaterra filho de Sir Ralph de Berners e Matilda. Ele casou-se com Christiana FitzHugh de Windsor aproximadamente 1270, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1295, sua profissão aparece como custodian of the archbishop of canterbury. Ele faleceu em janeiro de 1297, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Berners родился в местности бирнирс родинг, эссекс, Англия. Его родителей звали Sir Ralph de Berners и Matilda. Он женился на женщине по имени Christiana FitzHugh de Windsor около 1270 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1295 году он работал по профессии custodian of the archbishop of canterbury. Он умер январь 1297 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Berners nació en Berners Roding, Essex, Inglaterra como hijo de Sir Ralph de Berners y Matilda. Se casó con Christiana FitzHugh de Windsor aproximadamente 1270, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1295, su ocupación registrada era custodian of the archbishop of canterbury. Murió en enero de 1297, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra.
